1.premise: A push-up app is so demanding that users lose contact with family.

2.premise: A scooter injury leaves only the wrong hand available during a surprise sexual encounter.

1.premise: An injured dominant hand could be a non-dominant-hand sex problem.

2.premise: Fingering with the wrong hand is like plugging in a charger because both miss the hole.

lines.text: - Hey everybody, Salazar again.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I've been trying to gain muscle, lose some weight.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I downloaded this new app that doesn't let me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: use my phone until I do enough push-ups.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So if you see my friends and family,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: tell them I'm alive. Tell them I missed them.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, my luck with technology hasn't been great.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I fell on a Lime scooter about a month ago,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I fell on my right hand, and I couldn't use it for a while.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And it made things awkward because I'm a righty.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I ran into my ex-girlfriend at this bar.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She was drunk.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was drunk.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So we made out.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She was like, I want you to finger me right now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But all I had was my left.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And the best way I could describe it--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you ever tried to plug your charger in the dark?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I could have sworn the holes are right here.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: If you didn't get that, you're European.
lines.label: tag
